---
name: Bug report
about: Report an error, typo, or outdated info in the notes
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the issue**
A clear and concise description of what is wrong (typo, broken command, outdated service info, etc).

**Location**
File / section where the issue was found (e.g. `03-compute/ec2/06-auto-scaling-and-launch-templates.md`).

**Expected content**
What should it say instead?

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or links to AWS docs here.
